reservations.message:
Dear Daniel,
we are Jenny and Ralf from the south part of Germany.
We really like yoor appartement and the nice area of Colònia de Sant Jordi. We would be happy to stay at your place and have a relaxing time there!
Best wishes 
Jenny & Ralf
Hi Daniel, I'm visiting Mallorca with my husband, Jeremy, for the first time. We are looking forward to relaxing on the beach and eating delicious food in Sant Jordi, Illes Balears, Spain :)

Hola Daniel, 

somos Eva y Michael, vivimos en Munich/Allemania, son  33 y 39 anos. Michael es un Event-Manager y yo un PR-Manager. He olvidado quasi todo mi espanol - entonces lo siento y espero que puedes entender todo ;-) 

Nos gusteria si podiamos reservar su apartemento espontanaemente, para relajarse un pocito despues nuestra boda  el sabado pasado. 

Saludos
Eva y Michael

Hola Daniel, viajo con mi esposa Anna,  la foto que aparece en mi perfil de facebook es suya de cuando era pequeña. Es la única amiga que tengo allí, porque no utilizo facebook para socializar. Puedes ver su perfil  para identificarla.  Viajamos a Mallorca por primara vez y estamos muy ilusionados en conocer la isla. LLegaremos el sábado 8 de abril a las 10:40am y nuestra intención es alquilar un coche en el aeropuerto.
Espero que podamos conocernos.
Un cordial saludo

Hola Daniel,
We are a couple (39+38 Years old) from Hamburg and are getting married just before the holidays ;). We are visiting Mallorca for the first time and are looking forward to it!
Estabamos muy feliz si podríamos quedarnos en tu apartamiento!
Saludos,
Karin & Daniel
Hallo Daniel, hier Daniel;-)...I am looking forward coming to your flat with my brother...we have the flight at 10, so will arrive maybe around 1.30 / 14h....kind R daniel

Hi! Im Liza. I booked a room I Think, in your house. I just want to make sure Im not sharing it with other people. Coming for ca 5 Days and mostly the beach es trenc. But Im thankful for some info about the local areas, eg where to eat locally, shop fresh bread and where i can rent a car if i want to visit the North, eg Valldemossa. 

How long does it take to you from the Airport by taxi?

Also, I'll email you further about my arrival time.

Thank you in advance.

Liza

Hi Daniel,
We like to visit Mallorca for the first time, relax and do some sightseeing.
Your appartement looks very nice.
We hope we can stay with you for a fortnight.
kind regards Thérèse Tans

Hello Daniel,
we found your cozy flat and would like to ask, if it is availiable from 17.7 to 24.7.2017. 
My name is Janina, I am 33 years old and an journalist for a wine magazine. My boyfriend Christoph, 30 years and an engineer will join me. We are both nonesmoker and from germany.
Looking forward to hear from you.
Greetings
Janina & Christoph

hello daniel. your apartment looks amazing. we are two girls (30 years old) and would like to enjoy a week off in colonia san jordi. we love the sun, the beach and good food. we would appreciate to rent your apartment for this time. is it still available? 

greets raffaela
Hallo Daniel, ich besuche dich mit meiner Freundin Silke. Wir beide möchten etwas relaxen und uns die Insel anschauen.

Hi Daniel,

My name is Lisa. I'm swedish and am visiting Majorca with my 6 year old daughter. We are coming to relax and just enjoy the beaches and good food. We will arrive to Palma airport at 19:30 in the evening and are planning to rent a car to get Colonia de Sant Jordi. I hope a check in around 21:00 is ok by you?
Hi Daniel! I'd like to make a booking of your apartment.  Thank you in advance. Best regards, Kateryna

Hi Daniel, 
me and my girlfriend would like to stay at your apartment for 4 nights and explore the southeast of the island.
Regards,
Dimitri

Hi Daniel! Me and my girlfriend Zoe are coming for a 4-day break and like the look of your apartment! If possible, we'd also appreciate a taxi number of something to get to the apartment from the airport. Thanks!

Hello Daniel, 

me and my boyfriend Christian would love to stay at your apartment. We visited Colònia de Sant Jordi last year for the first time and fell in love with the area around, especially the beautiful nature with the Es Trenc.  

We booked a late flight, so we will arrive around 20:15 at Palma Airport. Hope it wouldn't be a problem to arrive late. 

We're looking forward to meet you.
Johanna & Christian
Hi Daniel, sorry we are two people. I have you on my wish list and forgot to chanche the person of two. We hope to see you in a week. Lovely greetings from Germany. Angelique

Buenas tardes Daniel,
Somos una pareja ( Ana y José )más una amiga (Toñi) que queremos visitar la isla y disfrutar de sus mágicos rincones. Estamos encantados de podernos alojar en tu apartamento ya que la cama de matrimonio y el sofá cama es perfecto para nuesras necesidades. Somos muy respetuosos y nos encanta relacionarnos con la gente y aprender con cada experiencia. Muchas gracias de antemano y un fuerte saludo!

Hello Daniel, we would be happy to stay at your apartment. We arrive at march 7th and would stay for one week. We, that's me, Anna, and two friends, Annely and Fiona. We are looking for a quite, relaxing vacation :) Please tell me if you need any other information. Greetings from cold Germany :) Anna
Hello we are a young couple from Berlin, Germany and we would like to stay at your apartment for one week.

Hello Daniel,

our names are Diana and Gordon and we are visiting mallorca the third time this April.
This time we would like to spent our holiday near Sant Jordi, so we are interested in your appartement.
Is it possible to rent the appartement on the given dates?
7th of April till 16th of April

Hi Daniel
Your Apartment Looks beautiful :) we are a young couple from Germany

Hi Daniel, 
we are coming from Berlin for a short trip to discover the beautiful island Mallorca. We´d love to stay at your apartment for 6 nights.
Greetings from Berlin,
Dan & Victoria (33 and 26)

Hi Daniel, my husband and me will visit Mallorca for the first time and would be happy to stay a week in your nice flat. 
BR Irina & Max

Ola Daniel

Ich Ngodup, geboren in Tibet, aufgewachsen in der Schweiz, möchte mit meiner Frau Barbara die Insel Mallorca erkunden.
Deine Wohnung gefällt uns sehr und es würde uns sehr freuen, bei dir Ferien zu machen.

Herzliche Grüsse aus Thun, Schweiz

Hi Daniel! 

We're Silvia and Andrea, a young couple from Italy. We really looking forward to having a great time in Spain and your place seems the best one for a special holiday.

Hoping to hear from you soon

Hola, 
Soy Veronica una chica italiana que quiere ir de vacaciones a Palma de Mallorca.

Hello Daniel,

my boyfriend (Karsten, 28) and I (Katja, 27) are coming to Mallorca for a week to enjoy our babymoon:-) We just came across your apartment and think it would be the perfect stay for us. We are very open-minded, clean and funny people, who like to travel and enjoy some quiet time as well. We are looking forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
Katja and Karsten:-)

Hi Daniel, ist ein späterer Check-in am Anreisetag möglich? Wir landen erst gegen 19:30 Uhr am 25.6. und müssen noch das Mietauto abholen.
Viele Grüße Agi & Pascal

Hallo,

mein Mann und ich würden gerne ihre Unterkunft mieten.
01.07.2018-08.07.2018

Bonsoir, nous serons 3 personnes pour la location, ma fille de 15 ans et mon compagnon, c'est la première fois que nous venons à Majorque.
Cordiales salutations. Sylvie

Hi Daniel,

My girlfriend and I loved your house! We would like to stay for 3 nights.

See you soon!

Thanks,
Emre

Hallo Daniel, we want to stay at mallorca for beach holiday. We are a pair - married 30 years ago! - and we searching for a nice place to have a relaxing holiday! Hope to see you in July this year!
Best wishes from Berlin, Birgit and Manfred

Bonjour, 

Nous sommes un couple de 30 ans avec deux enfants ( 5 ans et 1 an). Nous souhaiterions louer votre appartement afin de visiter l’île. Est-il disponible?
Merci

Audrey

Hola Daniel! Somos una pareja joven de Barcelona: Joan y Andrea, estamos muy interesados en alquilar tu apartamento. Nos ha gustado mucho y sobretodo ubicación donde se encuentra, dado que queremos una zona tranquila y con playas bonitas.
Deseo podamos hospedarnos para estas fechas.
Ruego contestación, muchas gracias!! :)

Hello Daniek, my name is Yugo. My wife and I, both Japanese living in Berlin would like to stay at yours from August 26th – 30th if possible. It's her birthday on the 26th and we are planning to visit Majorca for the first time.

We will be looking forward to hearing from you.

All my best, Yugo

Hola Daniel .
Soy Ana  ,  mi marido Charlie y yo  vivimos en Argentina . Mi hija Carolina ,quien reside en Londres,  celebra su boda en Mallorca  y ese es el motivo de nuestro viaje ; además aprovecharemos para conocer ese hermoso lugar. 
Saludos cordiales
Ana

Dear Daniel,

my boyfriend and me are looking forward to have a wonderful vacation in your lovely apartment. We are planing to stay for one week and will arrive by plain a little late.. will reach the apartment aroung 8:30 pm i hope this wont be a problem. Iam a 24 year old student and my boyfriend Matze is 28 year old research fellow, we wanna go diving and riding. Maybe you have some good trip advise too, we would love to see some hidden places! Looking forward to meet you, Best Regards Selina

Hi Daniel, we (Christian - 31 and Marie - 29 from Germany) will be happy to stay in your cozy apartment for our vacations in October. 
Greets!

Good day!
We're happy to see you soon in your lovely apartment!
We're Polish, Sylwia even knows few words in spanish. Only few unfortunately ;)
I think we'll reach apartment at 12am on thursday. If it's ok for you. 

Regards, 
Marcin

Hola Daniel, se ve excelente tu apartamento, y tengo pensado en llegar a Mallorca desde berlín, el viernes 16, en la tarde... es fácil llegar al área desde Palma?

Me avisas,
Mil gracias!

Hola Daniel!  Somos Gabriela y James. Nos ha gustado mucho tu apartamento!

Tenemos una preguntas:

Nuestro vuelo llegará a Palma a las 7.30pm  del Domingo 23 de Diciembre. Sería posible hacer el check in sobre las 9?

La otra pregunta es si hay calefacción en el piso.

Muchas gracias y un saludo.

Gabriela y James

Hallo, wir freuen uns auf unseren Urlaub bei dir.
Viele Grüße aus Hannover von
Christoph und Kai

Hallo Daniel, 

wir möchten im März ein paar Tage auf Mallorca entspannen. Es wäre prima, wenn das Apartment in der Zeit für uns verfügbar wäre.

Viele Grüße
André

Bonjour,
Nous venons pour une semaine de vacances avec mon compagnon, nous avons hâte de découvrir cette belle île ! Votre logement nous semble idéal. Nous arrivons le 2 avril à Palma en fin d'après midi ; le temps de récupérer la voiture de location et de venir jusqu'à votre logement je pense que nous y serons en début de soirée. Est-ce que cela pose un problème ?
Merci d'avance.
Juliette et Oscar
Hi Daniel, we look forward to staying at your place. Returning to Majorca for another trip and expect to arrive around 5 pm on April 10th. Hope this is ok. Best, Deniz & John

Hi Daniel, we Wolldecke be Gilad if we could speit our Raster Holiday in your property. It Wolldecke be Kind of you, if you could confirm asap, because we have to rent a car and Book flight also. Are there enough parkingspaces close to the appartement? Theres no Pool, alright? Very kind regards from Germany Jens and Nicole

Bonjour Daniel.
Nous sommes 2 Québecois (Canada) visitant Majorque pour la 1ère fois;  nous avons cependant visité l'Espagne à plusieurs reprises,  ainsi que plusieurs autres pays d'Europe.   Nous sommes habitués de voyager par Airbnb,  nous permettant, en louant un appartement,  de vivre la vie de la population locale tout en visitant les endroits touristiques et particuliers conseillés par le propriétaire. 
Nous atterrissons à Barcelone le 28 avril vers 11h30 et ensuite, par un vol de Ryanair, devrions arriver chez vous en milieu d'après-midi.
Nous repartirons le 10 mai vers Barcelone où nous rejoindrons notre fils, sa conjointe et notre petite-fille pour une vacance en famille à Calafell.
Je suis une retraitée de l'enseignement et mon mari, médecin, bientôt à la retraite (fin mars 2019).
Au plaisir de vous rencontrer.
Francine Loranger
Québec
Buenas! Me gustaría alojarme con mi pareja en su alojamento

Bonjour,
Nous serions ravie de de journée dans votre appartement afin de visiter l île de Majorque. Nous louons une voiture a l aéroport avez une place de parking?
Cordialement 
Noémie sancho

Hi, Daniel. 
Will update you regarding arrival time right after I get plane tickets (should happen next week).

Hiao! Soy Giulia, me gustaría venir a Palma por primera vez. Me estoy graduando en medicina veterinaria y me gustaría venir, junto con mi pareja, a relajarse bajo el sol durante unos días. ¡Esperando el buen tiempo! Pido disculpas si mi español no es bueno.
Lo único que tenemos que hacer el check out ( 6 junio) por la tarde, porque el avión para regresar a Roma es por la noche.
Gracias y espero verte pronto!

Hi Daniel, we are Oana and Theo and we'll be in Mallorca for a week in June. We'll spend the first few days in Artá and the last ones at your place. We're happy to have found your place, it seems so nice. 
Best wishes,
Oana

Hi Daniel,

We are Phi (27), Denise (26) and Kerstin (29) and the three of us are living and working in Germany. We will be in Palma for work the week after, but for the long weekend we would love to stay at your lovely apartment.

Looking forward to seeing you in June!

Best regards,
Phi

Hallo Daniel, wir sind auf deine Wohnung aufmerksam geworden und möchten diese gerne im nächsten Jahr buchen.

Wir waren bereits dieses Jahr in St. Jordi und so begeistert, dass wir sehr gerne wiederkommen möchten! Wir werden eine Woche zuvor heiraten, so dass wir im Anschluss daran gerne eine Woche auf Mallorca entspannen möchten.

Stehen in der Nähe der Wohnung auch kostenfreie Parkplätze zur Verfügung?

Wir freuen uns!

Liebe Grüße
Jannik und Alanah

Hi. Me and my husband are from Romania, but we live in London for a few years now. We want to come to Mallorca to relax and escape the busyness of London. We have never been there before, but we heard that is amazing.

Hello Daniel,

My husband and I are visiting Spain this summer and the last part of our trip in Majorca! we are super excited. We looking to hike, explore and enjoy the beaches:) we will be renting the care so we can explore the island is there a parking spot available?

Thanks!
Rita

Buonasera, arriveremo il giorno 11 luglio intorno alle 14.00. 
Posso chiederle se all’interno dell’appartamento si trova una lavatrice?
Grazie
Ilaria

Hola Daniel,

somos Michael y Anna de Munich, Alemania. Queremos hacer vacationes en Mallorca. Queremos visitar la isla más bonita del mundo otra vez después de ocho años :)

(Perdòn nuestro español, es muy mal no hemos lo hablado por cinco años :D If our Spanish was too bad to understand anything - our English is much better :D)

Cariños,
Michael y Anna

Hi Daniel
Would be great to stay at your place! ;-)
Best wishes
Max

Hi Daniel,

I am very excited to come to Mallorca and stay at your place with my boyfriend in summer.
We will most probably arrive between 20.00 and 21.00 o clock in the evening on September 5. I hope that´s not a problem.

We look forward to staying at your apartment!

Greetings from Germany
Pauline

Lieber Daniel,

wir freuen uns auf unseren Urlaub bei dir im Appartment :) In den Bewertungen haben wir gelesen, dass Du schon einmal ein Reisebett zur Verfügung gestellt hast. Besteht auch bei uns die Möglichkeit für unseren dann acht Monate alten Sohn ein Reisebett zu bekommen?

Viele Grüße aus Deutschland,
Hanna+Patrick+Emil

Hello Daniel! We (Charlotte & Arno), are looking forward to stay in your apartment. I still got one question. We're going to rent a car in Mallorca, is there free parking near the apartment? 
Kind regards, 
Charlotte & Arno
Hi Daniel we looking forward to meet you

Buenos dias,
Somos una pareja de franceses que desean visitar Mallorca y estamos interesados en alquilar su apartamento si es posible durante el período solicitado.
Gracias por su respuesta.

Manon y Nathan

Hola Daniel,
Mi hijo y yo vamos de viaje en Octubre x disfrutar al sol antes de que llegue el invierno en Alemania.
Tu depa tiene muy buena pinta, tengo muchas ganas de pasar tiempo alli e en las playas. 
Un saludo! Annabel

Hi Daniel,

my sister and I are looking forward to visit Mallorca!
Our flight arrives at 9:25 Pm at Palma. I hope it is Not to late!

Greetings from Germany 
Miriam
Hola Daniel. Somos Macarena y Jaime. Vamos a conocer Mallorca y esperamos que la estancia en tu apartamento sea fantástica, al menos parece que la gente está muy contenta. Un saludo

Hola Daniel 

My wife and I will be traveling to Majorca for some hiking, yoga etc in November and would like to stay in your apartment. :)

Kind regards

John

Hello Daniel, 
We will be arriving around 17:15 at the airport, hence we won't be able to make it to the 5 pm check-in. We will be leaving before 11 am on the 29.11 . We have never been to Mallorca but are excited to explore the beautiful island. Do you have any tips for hiking? Or a good rental car system? 
Have a lovely week!
Yours, 
Lorianna and Alexander

Hola Daniel, somos Gloria y Jorge,una pareja de colombianos viviendo en Paris, tenemos 60 años y queremos pasar las fiestas tranquilos y relajarnos, nos encantaria quedarnos en tu apartamento. Muchas Gracias

Hello, 
My mum and I would love to stay a week in February in your nice flat. 
We are looking forward to Mallorca. Greetings Leonie and Maren

Hi my name is Kevin and Im going to visit Mallorca with my girlfriend Ayako. We will arrive on 22.02. and we will inform you once we have more information about our flight arrival. Best regards, Kevin & Ayako

Hello Daniel,

Max and I would love to stay at your apartment!
Please note, that our flight arrives on 9th of March around 11:10 PM, so we would be at the apartment around 12:00 - 12:30 PM.
Please double check for yourself before confirming our stay.

Thank you, looking forward!
Best regards,
Alina

Hola Daniel,

somos una familia pequena, nuestro hijo tiene diez meses. Esperamos visitar Mallorca i  gastar nosotros vacationes en tu alojamiento. Somos de Munich. 

Llegamos al aeropuerto a las 15, creo que en alojamiento cerca a las 17. Tomamos alquilar un coche. 

Es posible de tener un „high chair“ i una cama pequena para bebe?

Lo siento, mi espanol es no muy bien. Lo estoy intentando mejorar la lengua, mi gusta mucho espanol.

Saludos

Erstina,Christian i Samuel

bonjour

nous serions ravis de séjourner dans votre logement sur notre semaine de vacances à majorque. En espérant que vous donnerez une suite favorable à notre demande, veuillez recevoir nos salutations distinguées

Hola, me llamo Miriam. We would like to live in your apartment for one week!

Greetings 
Miriam und Jens :-)

Hola Daniel!
Encantado de saludarte.
Vamos a Pasar unos días en Mallorca un amigo y yo. Nos encantaría poder hospedarnos en tu apartamento. Sería posible?
Un saludo!
Rafa.

Hola Daniel. Estoy deseando volver a Mallorca. Estuve 1 año viajando todas las semanas, por temas de trabajo (visitas de obras de un proyecto de rehabilitación fábrica textil para centro de día, viviendas y plaza en Palma). Tengo un recuerdo entrañable y después de 20 años me hace mucha ilusión volver. Tu casa me ha parecido ideal para mi propósito.

Hello! My husband and I are coming from Stuttgart for a little holiday. Would love to take care of your place for these days and enjoy the surroundings. Hope this all works out with the current situation :-)
Somos una pareja que nos encanta tu apartamento para pasar unos dias de relax.

Hi Daniel,

My sister and I are excited to come in late september,

your place looks lovely,

Thanks :)
Tabi
¡Hola, Daniel! ¿ Nos recomiendas sitios por donde hacer senderismo?

Hello, I´m Henning from Hamburgo/Germany. It would be nice to rent your apartment. I travel alone, non-smoker and no animals ...

I´m looking forward to your response.

Best regards
Henning
Hallo Daniel, wir würden gerne ein paar Tage bei dir verbringen. Wir kommen erst spät am Abend an, ca.21/22uhr. Ist das ok? Liebe Grüße
Hello, we are two girls from germany and we would like to stay at your lovely apartment for two weeks. We are looking forward to meet you :)

Hallo Daniel
we want to spend some nice days .
we are 2 sisters from Berlin.
Best regards
Ingelin and Regine

Hallo Daniel, wir, mein Freund u ich, haben deine Wohnung hier auf airbnb gefunden. Sie gefällt und sehr gut u würden sie gerne buchen. Gestern hat es leider wegen den Dokumenten noch nicht geklappt. Hoffen es ändert sich wegen corona nichts. 
Freuen uns auf den Urlaub, liebe Grüße Werner u Susanne

Dear Daniel,

since we are travelling with our son (20 months) it would be great if you could provide a baby cot and a high chair. We are looking forward to our stay.
Best
Marc

Hola ! Como estas ?

We will arive at 12:50 the 12th of june at the airport and we will leave at 9 - 10 am the 18th of june.
Flight IB3914 Arrival
Flight IB3919 Departure

Thank you ! Gracias !

Hello Daniel, we would like to stay in your apartment from 21st to 28th of June 2021. We don’t know the exact time of our arrival yet. We will let you know soon. If you need any other information please contact us any time. Thank you. Greetings, Leonard

Hi Daniel,
we are really looking forward to staying at your beautiful apartment!
Have a wonderful evening.
Best regards,
Viola & Daniel
Bonjour Daniel ! Je ne sais pas encore à quelle heure nous arriverons, je reviendrai vers vous.
Hello Daniel - my friend Sebastian and I are looking forward to staying at your place ! Thank uou

Hi Daniel, 
hope you are well. my husband and I would like to book your apartment end of august / beginning of sept. 
Kind regards from Germany 
Lisanne & Oliver

Hi Daniel,

We are a couple from London looking to spend a few days by the beach before meeting friends in Santanyí for the weekend. 

We will be arriving at Palma airport at 10:50 so we would love to check in early if possible.

Looking forward to staying in your beautiful home.

Marie and Carl.

Hi Daniel,

I am looking forward to staying in your apartment, which looks great on the pictures. 

Best regards
Tina

Buenas tardes ! 
Mi marido y yo deseamos descubrir Mallorca y su piso corresponde a lo que buscamos

Hello Daniel, I actually wanted to discover Mallorco last year. Unfortunately, Corona got in the way. I would like to make up for that now and I am happy to have found your apartment. Many greetings from Christian from Germany
Hi Daniel, we are looking forward to see you . The journey will be with my sister. She will sleep on the couch.

Dear Daniel, we are a quiet couple (age 52&54, non-smokers / no pets) and like to have relaxed holidays from Oct30-Nov4, 2021 in your nice airnb-appartement. We will rent a car from Airport PMI to your destination. Appreciate if you will send address and mabey a foto of the appartmenthouse (outside view) to e-mail hw20021969@gmail.com ? 
Let you know our arrival details after booking flights from Germany. 
Best regards Heike & Andreas

Hello Daniel,

Me and my boyfriend Nuno would like to stay at your appartment for one week.
We want to spend some beautiful days in Mallorca and do a tour around the island.

We would be very glad to stay at yours.

Best regards,

Sandrine and Nuno.

Hello Daniel,

My boyfriend (27) and I (23) would like to spend a few days including my birthday in Mallorca. We saw your apartment and liked it very much. We would be happy if we could stay there. 
Our arrival time will be on November 24th 9pm and we'll leave November 29th very early in the morning. 

Greeting from cold and rainy Germany, 

Lena

Hi Daniel,
I am arriving in Palma at 3:30p.m. so I will be in Colonia de Sant Jordi approx. at 5.
Cheers.
Michael

Hola, Sonia Aleksandra, Stojan y Muriel (1) de Austria. Please if you have a child seat for the table that would be very nice. 
Looking forward!

Hi Daniel

As discussed in December I will be arriving by bicycle. I am looking forward to stay at your apartment. 

Kind regards, 
Jasmine

Hola Daniel.
Somos Bárbara y Carlos. Quisiéramos quedarnos en tu piso 5 noches. 
Un saludo. Gracias.

Hi Daniel, I want to come to your place for some nice day over my birthday :-)

Cheers from Berlin
Hardy

Hey Daniel,

we would be very happy if we could live in the beautiful flat for three weeks in March. As we are both not only on holiday, but will also be working from the flat and have frequent video calls there, it is important for us that the internet works well. Can you tell us something about this?
We look forward to hearing from you!

Ann-Kathrin & Yannick

Hallo Daniel, 

wir sind Frank und Diana aus Deutschland Nähe Frankfurt am Main und würden gerne Dein schönes Appartement vom 3.4.-9.4. buchen.

Viele Grüße 
Diana & Frank

Hi Daniel. Me and my partner Annalena are traveling for our vacation and will arrive around 3.30pm on 09/04/22
Best wishes John
Dear Daniel, thanks a lot for your accommodate! We are happy to stay at your lovely apartment. Greetings from Berlin, Daniel, Julie and little Sam
Ni, we love travel ! Nice young couple :)

Hallo Daniel, meine Freundin Ela und ich würden gerne ein paar Tage in deiner Unterkunft auf dem schönen Mallorca verbringen. :) Ankunft am Flughafen ist 11.30

Liebe Grüße
Lisa
Hola! Viajo a Mallorca el 14 de mayo, me gusta tu apartamento y me viene guay para ir a la playa! Te dejo mi email y mi teléfono!

Hi Daniel,
We are looking forward to staying in your apartment in May.
Regards,
Anna & Dawid

Hello,

We are in Mallorca on the tail end of our honeymoon for a friend's wedding!

Thanks!
Emilie

Hi Daniel,
we would like to check in on 27.05 at 20:00.
Greetings 
Julian

Hi Daniel, we are please to come in Majorques. We are a french couple and should arrive in the afternoon at 3.30pm. We should have a rental car and come arounf 4.30 to 5pm.

See you soon :).
Mickael & Fatiha
Nous venons pour des vacances, nous ne savons pas encore notre heure d'arrivée.

Hello! We travel to Palma from Lisbon to stay for 5 days. We will spend the first day close to the airport, so we will arrive to your place on 14th June. For the exact hour, we can update you when the date is closer. Could you give some details about check in conditions?

Bonjour Daniel, 
Nous avons très hâte de venir visiter la belle Île de Majorque. Ce sera notre première fois. 

Nous arrivons à Majorque par Ferry le 20 juin à 6h30 AM. 
On se demandait s'il était possible de check-in dès notre arrivée ou s'il y avait des heures à respecter pour le check-in? 

Je vous remercie beaucoup et hâte de faire votre connaissance. 
Marie-Nashan et Jonathan

Hello Daniel ! With my friend we are very interesting by your apartment. Are there some towels ? 
Thank you in advance,
Have a nice day,
Charlène
Hola! Somos un pareja de Madrid, quisiéramos pasar unos días en Mallorca de relax.

Buenas Daniel,
Somos una pareja joven que iremos a veranear este año por primera vez a Mallorca.
